Magatron

The MAGA Machine

Kamacop

Hunter of Injustice

about
FreeDum Fighters

ultimate showdown

FreeDum Fighters is the ultimate showdown between two mechanized political figureheads: MAGATRON and Kamacop 9000, battling for total mechanized supremacy forever

satirical project

FreeDum Fighters is a satirical, gamified token project inspired by the ongoing U.S. presidental election, providing a parallel, humorous take an political events.

two reward pools

Users can stake their $DUM tokens choosing their side. If MAGATRON is in the lead, the Kamacop pool will offer hight rewards. Points are accumulated based on these activities, and an airdrop is distributed according to the points earned.

inflate egos

Click to inflate your chosen candidate's ego, reveling in the satirical farce of political theater as you participate in weekly FreeDum Fighters debates.

amass $DUM

Amass your $DUM and join in on the chaos supporting your chosen candidate through the staking pools in this mechanized political theater.

fuel the war machine

Harness the power of $DUM to fuel the political war machine of your Overlord of choice in this epic clash.

utility

Stake for Rewards in the Political Arena

Stake for Rewards in the Political Arena

Both MAGATRON and Kamacop 9000 are offering substantial staking rewards to DUM holders, blending financial returns with political spectacle. Stake wisely to gain the highest rewards.

Engage in Weekly Debates and Win Secret Airdrops

Engage in Weekly Debates and Win Secret Airdrops

Participate in spirited community debates each week during the $DUM presale. Craft compelling arguments for your chosen side. The victorious team receives covert airdrops of government funds, turning your political engagement into tangible profits.

Play Both Sides

Play Both Sides

As a $DUM holder, you bear witness to the constantly shifting tides of battle. Hedge your bets and enjoy unlimited staking opportunities with no regard to allegiance. Just like the political arena of our world, your chances to make money are near unlimited!

tokenomics

To ensure sufficient liquidity for trading on decentralized exchanges (DEXs), facilitating smooth and efficient transactions for all participants.

20%

liquidity pool

To ensure sufficient liquidity for trading on decentralized exchanges (DEXs), facilitating smooth and efficient transactions for all participants.

54,000,000,000 tokens

The Road to Victory

make crypto free again

launch the $DUM presale

the race

1

introduce staking pools for each party

2

start/continue weekly debates and polls

3

phase 3:
a new leader

finalize the debate and choose the winner of race

2

expand lore/storyline as the story unfolds in real-time

disclaimers

We are FreeDum Fighters and we support this message!

“FreeDum Fighters” is a fun and creative project designed to engage and entertain participants in the exciting world of cryptocurrency and blockchain. While we strive to create a vibrant community and innovative ecosystem, it is important to remember that this project is not a traditional investment opportunity.
